title: I remember meeting all of you in Grade 7

data.en: I remember meeting all of you in Grade 7.
data.cn: 我记得在七年级时遇到你们所有人。
data.hint: remember doing sth. 表示记得做过某事。
accept: I remember meeting all of you in Grade 7.

data.en: At junior high school, I remember winning a prize.
data.cn: 在初中时，我记得获得过一个奖项。
data.hint: At junior high school 表示在初中。
accept: At junior high school, I remember winning a prize.

data.en: We all helped you to look for your schoolbag.
data.cn: 我们都帮你寻找你的书包。
data.hint: help sb. to do sth. 表示帮助某人做某事。
accept: We all helped you to look for your schoolbag.

data.en: I used to be scared of Mr. Brown in Grade 8.
data.cn: 我在八年级时曾经害怕布朗先生。
data.hint: be scared of 表示害怕……。
accept: I used to be scared of Mr. Brown in Grade 8.

data.en: He was so strict and I always did my homework carefully.
data.cn: 他非常严厉，我总是仔细地做作业。
data.hint: carefully 是副词，修饰动词 did。
accept: He was so strict and I always did my homework carefully.

data.en: I remember doing homework carefully to meet his standards.
data.cn: 我记得为了达到他的标准而仔细地做作业。
data.hint: meet standards 表示达到标准/要求。
accept: I remember doing homework carefully to meet his standards.

data.en: We have been good friends ever since Grade 7.
data.cn: 自七年级以来，我们一直是好朋友。
data.hint: ever since 表示自……以来，常与现在完成时连用。
accept: We have been good friends ever since Grade 7.

data.en: I've enjoyed every year of junior high school.
data.cn: 我享受了初中生活的每一年。
data.hint: I've enjoyed 是现在完成时结构。
accept: I've enjoyed every year of junior high school.

data.en: I remember scoring two goals in a row during a competition.
data.cn: 我记得在一次比赛中连续进了两个球。
data.hint: in a row 表示连续地。
accept: I remember scoring two goals in a row during a competition.

data.en: I have learned to play the keyboard in music class.
data.cn: 我已经在音乐课上学会了弹电子琴。
data.hint: learn to do sth. 表示学会做某事。
accept: I have learned to play the keyboard in music class.

data.en: Which teachers will you miss the most after junior high?
data.cn: 初中毕业后你最想念哪些老师？
data.hint: miss the most 表示最想念。
accept: Which teachers will you miss the most after junior high?

data.en: Ms. Lee was always patient with you in math class.
data.cn: 数学课上，李老师总是对你很有耐心。
data.hint: be patient with sb. 表示对某人有耐心。
accept: Ms. Lee was always patient with you in math class.

data.en: She helped you to work out the answers yourself.
data.cn: 她帮助你自己算出答案。
data.hint: work out 表示算出; 解决。
accept: She helped you to work out the answers yourself.

data.en: The answers were difficult no matter how she explained them.
data.cn: 无论她如何解释，答案都很困难。
data.hint: no matter how 表示无论如何。
accept: The answers were difficult no matter how she explained them.

data.en: Mr. Brown guided me to do a lot better in science.
data.cn: 布朗先生指导我在科学方面取得了很大进步。
data.hint: guide sb. to do sth. 表示引导某人做某事。
accept: Mr. Brown guided me to do a lot better in science.

data.en: He always took the time to explain things to me clearly.
data.cn: 他总是花时间清楚地向我解释事情。
data.hint: take the time to do sth. 表示花时间做某事。
accept: He always took the time to explain things to me clearly.

data.en: Whenever I couldn't understand anything, he explained clearly to me.
data.cn: 每当我有任何不理解的地方，他都会向我解释清楚。
data.hint: whenever 表示每当; 无论何时。
accept: Whenever I couldn't understand anything, he explained clearly to me.

data.en: Ms. Griffin encouraged me a lot in English class.
data.cn: 格里芬老师在英语课上给了我很多鼓励。
data.hint: encourage sb. 表示鼓励某人。
accept: Ms. Griffin encouraged me a lot in English class.

data.en: Because of her encouragement, I put in more effort.
data.cn: 因为她的鼓励，我付出了更多的努力。
data.hint: put in effort 表示付出努力。
accept: Because of her encouragement, I put in more effort.

data.en: My exam scores doubled at the end of the term.
data.cn: 在学期末，我的考试成绩翻了一番。
data.hint: at the end of 表示在……末尾。
accept: My exam scores doubled at the end of the term.

data.en: I'm so happy I don't have to do P.E. again.
data.cn: 我太高兴了，我再也不用上体育课了。
data.hint: don't have to 表示不必; 不用。
accept: I'm so happy I don't have to do P.E. again.

data.en: He gave us clear instructions so that we'd be safe.
data.cn: 他给了我们清晰的指示，以便我们能够安全。
data.hint: so that 引导目的状语从句。
accept: He gave us clear instructions so that we'd be safe.

data.en: Mr. Hunt was kind when I hurt my knee.
data.cn: 当我伤到膝盖时，亨特先生很和善。
data.hint: when 引导时间状语从句。
accept: Mr. Hunt was kind when I hurt my knee.

data.en: He advised me to take a break from running.
data.cn: 他建议我暂停跑步休息一下。
data.hint: advise sb. to do sth. 表示建议某人做某事。
accept: He advised me to take a break from running.

data.en: We wrote a letter to the band about our dream.
data.cn: 我们给乐队写了一封信，讲述了我们的梦想。
data.hint: write a letter to sb. 表示给某人写信。
accept: We wrote a letter to the band about our dream.

data.en: They offered to come and play at our school.
data.cn: 他们主动提出要来我们学校演奏。
data.hint: offer to do sth. 表示主动提出做某事。
accept: They offered to come and play at our school.

data.en: I want to go to senior high and then university.
data.cn: 我想上高中，然后上大学。
data.hint: senior high 表示高中。
accept: I want to go to senior high and then university.

data.en: I want to study medicine in the future.
data.cn: 我未来想要学习医学。
data.hint: in the future 表示在未来。
accept: I want to study medicine in the future.

data.en: Today is the students' last class together.
data.cn: 今天是学生们在一起的最后一堂课。
data.hint: students' 是名词所有格形式。
accept: Today is the students' last class together.

data.en: Bob feels sad about it and thinks classes were great.
data.cn: 鲍勃对此感到难过，并认为课程很棒。
data.hint: feel sad about sth. 表示对某事感到难过。
accept: Bob feels sad about it and thinks classes were great.

data.en: Bob hopes to pass the exam to get into senior high.
data.cn: 鲍勃希望通过考试进入高中。
data.hint: hope to do sth. 表示希望做某事。
accept: Bob hopes to pass the exam to get into senior high.

data.en: Shirley wants to get into a music school.
data.cn: 雪莉想要进入一所音乐学校。
data.hint: get into 表示进入; 考入。
accept: Shirley wants to get into a music school.

data.en: Ken won a prize for science last year.
data.cn: 肯去年获得了科学奖项。
data.hint: win a prize for 表示因……获得奖项。
accept: Ken won a prize for science last year.

data.en: He wants to be an astronaut and go into space.
data.cn: 他想成为一名宇航员并进入太空。
data.hint: go into space 表示进入太空。
accept: He wants to be an astronaut and go into space.

data.en: I'm going to improve my English so that I can teach kids.
data.cn: 我打算提高我的英语，以便将来能够教孩子们。
data.hint: improve English 表示提高英语水平。
accept: I'm going to improve my English so that I can teach kids.

data.en: All of you should go for it because I believe in you.
data.cn: 你们所有人都应该去争取，因为我信任你们。
data.hint: believe in 表示信任; 信赖。
accept: All of you should go for it because I believe in you.

data.en: We're having a party to celebrate the end of school.
data.cn: 我们正在举办一个派对来庆祝毕业。
data.hint: celebrate the end of 表示庆祝……的结束。
accept: We're having a party to celebrate the end of school.

data.en: Thank you for coming today to attend the graduation ceremony.
data.cn: 谢谢你们今天来参加毕业典礼。
data.hint: thank sb. for doing sth. 表示因某事感谢某人。
accept: Thank you for coming today to attend the graduation ceremony.

data.en: First of all, I'd like to congratulate all of you.
data.cn: 首先，我想向你们所有人表示祝贺。
data.hint: first of all 表示首先。
accept: First of all, I'd like to congratulate all of you.

data.en: I remember meeting you when you were starting Grade 7.
data.cn: 我记得在你们刚开始上七年级时遇到你们。
data.hint: remember doing sth. 表示记得做过某事。
accept: I remember meeting you when you were starting Grade 7.

data.en: You were all so full of energy and thirsty for knowledge.
data.cn: 你们曾经都如此充满活力，渴望知识。
data.hint: be thirsty for 表示渴望……。
accept: You were all so full of energy and thirsty for knowledge.

data.en: Today I see a room full of talented young adults.
data.cn: 今天我看到一屋子有才华的年轻一代。
data.hint: full of 表示充满……的。
accept: Today I see a room full of talented young adults.

data.en: Although you worked hard, none of you did it alone.
data.cn: 虽然你们工作努力，但没有人是独自完成的。
data.hint: Although 引导让步状语从句。
accept: Although you worked hard, none of you did it alone.

data.en: Never fail to be thankful to the people around you.
data.cn: 千万不要忘记感激你身边的那些人。
data.hint: be thankful to sb. 表示对某人心存感激。
accept: Never fail to be thankful to the people around you.

data.en: Life in senior high school will be harder.
data.cn: 高中的生活将会更加艰难。
data.hint: senior high school 表示高中。
accept: Life in senior high school will be harder.

data.en: You have many difficult tasks ahead of you.
data.cn: 在你们的前方有许多艰难的任务。
data.hint: ahead of you 表示在你前方。
accept: You have many difficult tasks ahead of you.

data.en: You'll make mistakes along the way, but you must learn.
data.cn: 你在一路上会犯错误，但你必须学习。
data.hint: make mistakes 表示犯错。
accept: You'll make mistakes along the way, but you must learn.

data.en: Choose wisely and be responsible for your decisions.
data.cn: 做出明智的选择，并对你的决定负责。
data.hint: be responsible for 表示对……负责。
accept: Choose wisely and be responsible for your decisions.

data.en: As you set out on your new journey, don't forget.
data.cn: 在你开始新的旅程时，不要忘记（你来自何处）。
data.hint: set out on 表示开始进行新的事情/出发。
accept: As you set out on your new journey, don't forget.

data.en: Knowledge will give you wings to fly high.
data.cn: 知识将会给你飞高的翅膀。
data.hint: give sb. sth. 表示给某人某物。
accept: Knowledge will give you wings to fly high.
